scripts.containers:stop-services: docker compose stop auth-service user-service post-service
scripts.dev:post: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --build post-service
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n USER,AUTH -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix ./services/user-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix ./services/auth-service run start:dev"
scripts.start:dev: npm run containers:stop-services && npm run db:up && npm run prisma:generate && npm run dev:post && npm run dev:services
